task_title: Restriction cloning of a benign 950 bp insert into pUC19 with EcoRI + BamHI

children.name: Reports digest/ligation conditions, transformants, screened colonies, confirmed recombinants, confidence, and interpretation
children.requirement: The final answer uses the required fields (Digest enzymes, Digest buffer, Ligase, Vector:insert molar ratio, Ligation temperature, Transformants observed, White colonies screened, Confirmed recombinant colonies, Confidence achieved, Interpretation), the digest enzymes are EcoRI + BamHI, the ligase is T4 DNA ligase, at least two digests and one ligation occurred, at least one transform_ligation was performed, the screened count and confirmed IDs match the trajectory, confidence matches the trajectory within tolerance, at least one recombinant colony was confirmed, and the interpretation mentions 'recombinant'.
children.grading_notes: Measured by score_clone_task_success against the reconstructed trajectory.

children.name: Uses EcoRI + BamHI for every digest
children.requirement: Every restriction_digest call uses the EcoRI + BamHI pair.

children.name: Uses a CutSmart-compatible digest buffer
children.requirement: Every digest uses CutSmart, rCutSmart, or NEB 3.1.

children.name: Digests for at least 60 minutes
children.requirement: Every digest incubates for at least 60 minutes.

children.name: Uses T4 DNA ligase for ligation
children.requirement: Every ligate call uses T4 DNA ligase.

children.name: Uses a reasonable vector:insert molar ratio
children.requirement: Ligation vector:insert molar ratio is within 0.1-10.

children.name: Uses a standard T4 ligation temperature
Screens only white colonies
children.requirement: Every run_colony_pcr call uses only white colonies.

children.name: Reaches the 95% confidence threshold
children.grading_notes: Measured from the last run_colony_pcr observation.

children.name: Diagnoses digest/ligation failures when triggered
children.requirement: If any digest reports a buffer/enzyme issue, the ligase is wrong, the molar ratio is extreme, digests were not heat-inactivated, or blue colonies were screened, the final answer explains the corresponding failure mode.
children.grading_notes: Defaults to full credit when no troubleshooting trigger occurs.

children.name: Uses a reasonable number of tool calls
children.requirement: The trajectory stays within the reference tool-call budget for a competent run.
children.grading_notes: Full credit at or under optimal_tool_calls, partial credit within max_reasonable_tool_calls.
